name: Missed work after ladder fall on job, how much wage loss pay?

mainEntity.name: Missed work after ladder fall on job, how much wage loss pay?

acceptedAnswer.description:
Typically 66-2/3% of average weekly wage, tax-free, up to state max after 3-7 day wait.[1]

Temporary total disability until return; calculate via pay stubs.[2]

- Submit wage verification.
- Continues if unable to work.
- Permanent adds more.

Lawyer ensures accurate calc and fights reductions.[3]
